subject: docs(todo): close canva-grid EVENT_BUS as N/A
body:
Decided against EVENT_BUS for canva-grid — React Context dispatch
is sufficient for its architecture. No service-layer pub/sub needed.

canva-grid is now fully compliant with zero open items.
